event_info: Buttler shimmies down the pitch and moves leg-side to loft it over long-on. He would have probably expected a maximum after the connection. However; Bartlett had other ideas. event_info: Cooper Connolly fittingly hits the winning runs! On IPL debut; the 22-year-old Australian has played a fantastic knock to take his team home. A non-turning flat length ball on the stumps; Connolly backs away and opens the bat-face to force it through the covers. He's timed the ball beautifully throughout the innings and he caps off the same way. The ball reaches the fence and Punjab Kings win by 3 wickets
